title: Hat Layer
description: Ensures the hat layer of skins always appears in the tab list.
body:
The Hat Layer mod ensures the hat layer of player skins always appears in the tab player list, regardless of distance or gamemode. 

This mod fixes the bug detailed in [MC-71990](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-71990) (The "Hat" layer of a player skin is not shown in the tab list under certain conditions).

### Fixed in latest snapshot 24w44a
